```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 1em 0.95em;margin-bottom:0.95em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(212,95,71,0.1);position:relative;">
  <div style="position:absolute;top:-0.7em;left:1em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#D45F47,#B5476A);color:#F8F7F0;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;padding:0.2em 0.7em;border-radius:999px;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;">the noise</div>
  <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0.3em;justify-content:center;margin-top:0.3em;">
   <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;background:#F8F7F0;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;text-decoration:line-through;">10 must-install</span>
   <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;background:#F8F7F0;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;text-decoration:line-through;">the only IDE</span>
   <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;background:#F8F7F0;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;text-decoration:line-through;">switch to X</span>
   <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;background:#F8F7F0;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;text-decoration:line-through;">5 plugins, 10×</span>
   <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;background:#F8F7F0;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:5px;text-decoration:line-through;">framework Tuesday</span>
  </div>
 </div>

 <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FFFFFF,#F4F2FB);border-radius:14px;padding:0.95em 1em 1em;box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(86,84,162,0.12);position:relative;">
  <div style="position:absolute;top:-0.7em;left:1em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#5654A2,#3F3D7E);color:#F8F7F0;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;padding:0.2em 0.7em;border-radius:999px;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;">the truth</div>
  <div style="font-size:0.78em;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.5;text-align:center;margin-top:0.3em;">
   <strong style="color:#5654A2;">No must-install kit.</strong>
   <div style="font-size:0.85em;color:#564232;margin-top:0.3em;">Most of what you need is <strong style="color:#C4881A;">buildable</strong>.</div>
  </div>
 </div>

</div>
```
